violations.text: Various grab-n-go items packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Management updated labels during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Working containers of spices are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Inspector observed single service items (cases of cups) on a shelf less than 6 inches off the floor in the storage room area. Items should be at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The ceiling tiles above the refrigerator were observed fallen/missing. PIC stated work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Handwashing sinks in front counter area is lacking signage. A sign or poster must posted notifying food employees to wash their hands must be provided at all handwashing sinks. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

(Smoothies) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The (ceiling tiles ) in the (front counter) area is in poor repair. Missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
